name: Stickman Go
author: Poki
description: Stickman Go is an action platform role-playing game where you're a brave stickman figure in a medieval fantasyland full of dungeons. Discover secrets, exciting quests, pets, and valuable loot in your adventures. Defeat bosses, fight flying minions, monsters, and more... Make sure to upgrade your abilities regularly to stay on top of the challenge. You can unlock a multitude of skins and accessories to keep the game fresh. Don't forget to visit the Lucky Wheel to earn some free cash while you're at it. We know you have the skill it takes to finish Stickman Go. Go! How to play Stickman Go? Move - WASD or Arrow keys Attack - Left mouse click or Space bar Use/Interact - Space bar Pause - ESC Who created Stickman Go? Stickman Go was created by PEGASUS. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Stickman Go for free? You can play Stickman Go for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Go on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Go can be played on your computer.
